instruction: Find the official websites of the top ten schools in the 2024 QS rankings, and add them to Chrome bookmarks for quick access to these websites.
answer: https://www.mit.edu/, https://www.cam.ac.uk/, https://www.ox.ac.uk/, https://www.harvard.edu/, https://www.stanford.edu/, https://www.imperial.ac.uk/, https://ethz.ch/, https://www.nus.edu.sg/, https://www.ucl.ac.uk/, https://www.berkeley.edu/
